notes: Only proper rotations are considered; reflections are intentionally excluded.
Identity is always included. Other transforms are accepted only after geometry validation.
Runtime code should treat these as precomputed candidates, not as proof of functional assembly equivalence.

continuous_symmetries.note: Trimesh inertia-based radial symmetry candidate; finite samples are validated separately.
